scope: Per-brigade changed-field display before applying a saved multi-brigade battle plan
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Opened app at 1440x900 and reset the campaign.
Clicked 計画セット保存 to create 戦線計画 1.
Changed the selected brigade draft to 弾性防御 and 集中射撃.
Verified the plan-set row showed 差分 1 and 差分あり.
Verified preview details showed 戦場 現主戦場, 戦区標準（現行一致）, 標準予備, 指定予備 0保存・現行0, and 未投入なし.
Verified the expanded unit diff named 第1戦列歩兵大隊 and listed 姿勢 / 弾薬方針 / 後退線 with the saved summary 固守 / 最接近 / 通常射撃.
Verified the row returned to 差分 0 / 即適用可 and displayed 旅団方針差分なし。
Reset the QA campaign and viewport afterward.
notes: Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
